packages.title: Southeast Asia Explorer
packages.overview: Three iconic Southeast Asian nations in one unforgettable journey. From Bangkok's glittering temples and Chiang Mai's hill tribes to Hanoi's charming Old Quarter, Halong Bay's UNESCO waters, and Singapore's futuristic cityscape — a trip that perfectly blends culture, cuisine, and adventure.
highlights: Halong Bay overnight cruise through emerald limestone karsts
Authentic Thai cooking class in Chiang Mai
Gardens by the Bay & Singapore's night skyline
Mekong Delta boat tour through floating markets
Bangkok's Grand Palace & Wat Pho

itinerary.title: Arrive Bangkok
activities: Welcome dinner at a riverside Thai restaurant

itinerary.title: Chiang Mai Culture
activities: Thai cooking class with local chef

itinerary.title: Fly to Hanoi
activities: Hoan Kiem Lake & Old Quarter walking tour
Street food evening: pho & banh mi

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Cruise
activities: Drive to Halong Bay, board overnight cruise

itinerary.title: Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh
activities: Hoan Kiem stroll & Temple of Literature
Flight to Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Fly to Singapore
activities: Gardens by the Bay & Cloud Forest

itinerary.title: Singapore Highlights
activities: Clarke Quay dinner by the river

packages.title: European Grand Tour
packages.overview: Discover the grandeur of Europe's three most iconic cities across 15 days. The romance of Paris, the ancient glory of Rome, and the vibrant energy of Barcelona come together in this premium tour that lets you truly absorb each city's unique soul — without ever feeling rushed.
highlights: Skip-the-line Louvre Museum & Eiffel Tower access
Private guided Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel tour
Sagrada Família & Park Güell in Barcelona
Tuscany countryside wine tasting day trip
Scenic Eurail train through the Alps

itinerary.title: Arrive Paris
activities: Dinner at a classic Parisian bistro

itinerary.title: Tuscany Day Trip
activities: Chianti wine tasting at a vineyard

packages.title: Middle East Marvel
packages.overview: From Dubai's record-breaking skyscrapers and Abu Dhabi's golden mosques to Jordan's ancient rose-red city of Petra and the serene Dead Sea, this 9-day Middle East marvel tours a region that effortlessly blends ancient history with futuristic opulence. A journey of genuine wonder.
highlights: Burj Khalifa At the Top observation deck
Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque in Abu Dhabi
Petra by Night — Treasury lit by candlelight
Wadi Rum desert jeep safari & Bedouin camp
Float in the Dead Sea

itinerary.title: Dubai Highlights
activities: Burj Khalifa 'At the Top' observation deck

itinerary.title: Desert Safari
activities: Dune bashing in the Red Dunes
Bedouin camp dinner with belly dance

itinerary.title: Fly to Amman, Jordan
activities: Rainbow Street evening & local meze dinner

itinerary.title: Petra – Rose City
activities: The Siq canyon walk to the Treasury
Petra by Night — candlelight Treasury experience

itinerary.title: Wadi Rum Desert
activities: Drive to Wadi Rum protected area
Overnight in Bedouin luxury camp under stars

itinerary.title: Dead Sea
activities: Float in the mineral-rich Dead Sea
Mud bath & spa treatment at resort

packages.title: Far Eastern Wonders
packages.overview: The Far East is a world unto itself — ancient traditions meeting cutting-edge modernity. Experience Japan's cherry blossoms and Shinkansen bullet trains, Seoul's K-culture and street food markets, and Beijing's imperial grandeur with the Great Wall on the horizon. A 16-day cultural odyssey like no other.
highlights: Mount Fuji panorama from Hakone
Shinkansen bullet train through the Japanese countryside
Great Wall of China at Mutianyu section
Seoul's Gyeongbokgung Palace in hanbok attire
Kyoto's Arashiyama bamboo grove at dawn

itinerary.title: Nara Day Trip
activities: Nara's friendly deer park & Todai-ji temple

itinerary.title: Return Tokyo & Fly Seoul
activities: Morning flight to Seoul, South Korea

itinerary.title: Great Wall of China
activities: Cable car ride up & toboggan descent

itinerary.title: Beijing Imperial Tour
activities: Peking duck dinner at a classic restaurant

itinerary.title: Free Day Shanghai
activities: Farewell dinner at restaurant with Pudong views

packages.title: North America Adventure
packages.overview: Three incredible North American nations — each with its own dramatic identity. From New York's iconic skyline and Niagara Falls to Canada's Rocky Mountain lakes and Mexico's ancient Mayan ruins by the Caribbean Sea, this 11-day adventure showcases the vast, thrilling diversity of the North American continent.
highlights: Niagara Falls boat ride (Maid of the Mist)
Banff National Park & Lake Louise turquoise waters
Chichen Itza Mayan pyramid — a UNESCO Wonder
New York City: Statue of Liberty & Times Square
Tulum cliff-side ruins above the Caribbean

itinerary.title: Arrive New York City
activities: JFK airport arrival & Manhattan hotel check-in
Dinner at a classic NYC steakhouse

itinerary.title: New York Icons
activities: Statue of Liberty & Ellis Island ferry

itinerary.title: NYC to Niagara
activities: Maid of the Mist boat experience & Niagara lights

itinerary.title: Tulum
activities: Tulum Mayan ruins above the Caribbean sea

itinerary.title: Cancun Leisure
activities: Morning water sports: parasailing & jet ski
Isla Mujeres day trip by ferry

packages.title: South America Explorer
packages.overview: South America is the continent of superlatives — the highest Incan citadel, the world's largest rainforest, and the thundering falls that dwarf Niagara. This 13-day explorer spans Peru's ancient Incan empire, the Amazon's wild heart in Brazil, and Argentina's tango-fuelled Buenos Aires. Adventure in its purest form.
highlights: Machu Picchu sunrise — the iconic lost city of the Incas
Amazon River boat journey deep into the rainforest
Iguazu Falls — the world's most powerful waterfall system
Sacred Valley Incan ruins & local market
Buenos Aires tango show & steak dinner

itinerary.title: Arrive Lima, Peru
activities: Miraflores cliff walk & Pacific Ocean sunset
Ceviche dinner in the city's food district

itinerary.title: Lima & Fly to Cusco
activities: Cusco Plaza de Armas evening walk

itinerary.title: Machu Picchu
activities: Optional Inca Sun Gate hike, return to Cusco

itinerary.title: Fly to Manaus, Brazil
activities: Sunset canoe on the Amazon's tributaries

itinerary.title: Meeting of the Waters
activities: Boat tour to the Meeting of Rio Negro & Amazon

itinerary.title: Fly to Foz do Iguaçu
activities: Macuco Safari boat ride into the falls spray

itinerary.title: Buenos Aires
activities: San Telmo antique market & tango street show
Parrilla steak dinner & Milonga tango show
